% === Table: M1 Executability by LLM and Prompt Strategy ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M1 Executability (\%) by LLM and prompt strategy. Each cell: pass/total (18 runs).}\label{tab:m1grid}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}lccccc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{LLM} & \textbf{Naive} & \textbf{Zero-shot} & \textbf{Schema-aware} & \textbf{Few-shot} & \textbf{Overall} \\
    \midrule
    GPT-4o & 89\% (16/18) & 78\% (14/18) & 100\% (18/18) & 100\% (18/18) & 92\% (66/72) \\
    Claude Sonnet & 83\% (15/18) & 100\% (18/18) & 100\% (18/18) & 100\% (18/18) & 96\% (69/72) \\
    Llama 3 70B & 17\% (3/18) & 78\% (14/18) & 72\% (13/18) & 78\% (14/18) & 61\% (44/72) \\
    \midrule
    \textbf{Overall} & \textbf{63\%} (34/54) & \textbf{85\%} (46/54) & \textbf{91\%} (49/54) & \textbf{93\%} (50/54) & \textbf{83\%} (179/216) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

% === Table: M1 Executability by Task ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M1 Executability (\%) by clinical process task (36 runs each).}\label{tab:m1task}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}llcc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{Task} & \textbf{Process} & \textbf{M1 Pass} & \textbf{Rate} \\
    \midrule
    T1 & ICU Pathway & 33/36 & 92\% \\
    T2 & Medication Admin. & 23/36 & 64\% \\
    T3 & Sepsis Trajectory & 33/36 & 92\% \\
    T4 & Lab-Order Cycle & 24/36 & 67\% \\
    T5 & ED Flow & 34/36 & 94\% \\
    T6 & Diagnosis Pathway & 32/36 & 89\% \\
    \midrule
    \textbf{Total} & & 179/216 & 83\% \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

% === Table: M3/M4 Main Results (averaged across tasks) ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M3 Completeness and M4 Fidelity results averaged across all six tasks. Bold = best in column. --- = ground-truth SQL not yet available.}\label{tab:m3m4}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}llccc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{LLM} & \textbf{Strategy} & \textbf{M3a (case cov.)} & \textbf{M3b (act.~cov.)} & \textbf{M4a (Jaccard)} \\
    \midrule
    GPT-4o & Naive & \cellcolor{red!20}9.5\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.000 \\
     & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}83.3\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{green!20}\textbf{100.0\%} & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}88.9\% & \cellcolor{red!20}16.7\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.089 \\
    \midrule
    Claude Sonnet & Naive & \cellcolor{red!20}0.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.000 \\
     & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}100.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}16.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.168 \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{green!20}93.2\% & \cellcolor{red!20}16.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.168 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}100.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}\textbf{17.2\%} & \cellcolor{red!20}\textbf{0.170} \\
    \midrule
    Llama 3 70B & Naive & \cellcolor{red!20}0.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.0\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.000 \\
     & Zero-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}77.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Schema-aware & \cellcolor{green!20}66.7\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.1\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.001 \\
     & Few-shot & \cellcolor{green!20}77.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}16.8\% & \cellcolor{red!20}0.090 \\
    \midrule
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

% === Table: M5 Prompt Sensitivity ===
\begin{table}[t]
  \caption{M5 Prompt Sensitivity: standard deviation of M1, M3a, M3b, M4a across the four prompt strategies, per LLM and clinical process task. Higher = more sensitive to prompt choice.}\label{tab:m5}
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{@{}llcccc@{}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{LLM} & \textbf{Task} & \textbf{$\sigma$(M1)} & \textbf{$\sigma$(M3a)} & \textbf{$\sigma$(M3b)} & \textbf{$\sigma$(M4a)} \\
    \midrule
    GPT-4o & ICU Pathway & 0.333 & 0.500 & 0.003 & 0.003 \\
     & Medication Admin. & 0.500 & 0.572 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Sepsis Trajectory & 0.333 & 0.333 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Lab-Order Cycle & 0.167 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & ED Flow & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Diagnosis Pathway & 0.167 & 0.392 & 0.500 & 0.266 \\
    \midrule
    Claude Sonnet & ICU Pathway & 0.500 & 0.500 & 0.004 & 0.004 \\
     & Medication Admin. & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Sepsis Trajectory & 0.000 & 0.473 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Lab-Order Cycle & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.013 & 0.007 \\
     & ED Flow & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Diagnosis Pathway & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.500 & 0.500 \\
    \midrule
    Llama 3 70B & ICU Pathway & 0.471 & 0.471 & 0.004 & 0.004 \\
     & Medication Admin. & 0.193 & 0.193 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Sepsis Trajectory & 0.500 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Lab-Order Cycle & 0.319 & 0.319 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & ED Flow & 0.000 & 0.500 & 0.000 & 0.000 \\
     & Diagnosis Pathway & 0.500 & 0.500 & 0.500 & 0.266 \\
    \midrule
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
